Your file won't upload?
Let's fix that.

Check, compress, resize, and convert images, PDFs, and signatures — all processed directly in your browser. No upload to any server.

Check My Fileor choose a tool below

What's the problem with your file?

File too largeWrong dimensionsUnsupported formatSignature issueNeed to merge PDFsNeed to split PDFUpload keeps failingNot sure what's wrong

Everything you need to prepare your files

Image Tools

Compress, resize, crop, convert, and clean image files for any upload requirement.

  • Image Compressor
  • Image Resizer & Cropper
  • Image Format Converter
  • Signature Processor
  • Remove Image Metadata

PDF Tools

Convert images to PDF, merge multiple PDFs, split pages, and organize documents.

  • Image to PDF
  • Merge PDFs
  • Split & Extract PDF

Check & Calculate

Verify your files meet requirements and convert between measurement units.

  • File Compliance Checker
  • DPI & Size Calculator

Tools for every situation

Job Applications

Compress resumes, merge cover letters, and adjust photos for job portals.

School & University

Process application photos, signatures, and documents for admissions.

Exam Registration

Meet strict photo and signature requirements for test registration.

Visa & Passport

Check photo dimensions, file sizes, and format requirements.

Government Forms

Adjust scans, fix orientations, and prepare attachments for online services.

Everyday Office

Compress email attachments, convert HEIC, and merge documents.

Your files never leave your device

All image and PDF processing happens directly in your browser using local processing. Your files are not uploaded to any server. We cannot see, access, or store your documents.

How it works

1. Check your file

Upload your file and see what's wrong — wrong size, format, dimensions, or orientation.

2. Fix it in one click

Our tools recommend the right fix. Compress, resize, convert, or merge with a single action.

3. Compare and download

See before-and-after results. Download your processed file — ready to upload.

Works in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Best on desktop or tablet.

Privacy Policy

This site is not affiliated with any government agency. Tools process files locally in your browser.
